title: For-Advocate Brief Output (debate-prism)
description: Schema for the structured report returned by the for-advocate subagent in debate-prism.

claim.description: The directional claim under debate, restated by the advocate. Must match the claim in the brief.

corePosition.description: One-to-two-sentence best-supported version of the claim the advocate is defending.

citations.description: Ordered list of citations. Every non-derived claim in analysis[] must reference an index into this array.

citesIndices.description: Indices into citations[] that support this step. Derived claims reference the citations of the steps they derive from.

derivedFrom.description: Step numbers this claim derives from.

attemptedCalls.description: Documentation of attempted calls. Required non-empty when performed=false.

recommendation.description: Direct recommendation given only the for-case. Honest about limits of the data.

degradationEvidence.description: Set to 'unverified' when the advocate claimed webResearch.performed=false with zero attemptedCalls[] after a re-dispatch.
